title: cotoneaster frigidus var. affinis
intro: Cotoneaster frigidus var. affinis is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its dense, thorny branches and glossy, dark green leaves. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cotoneaster frigidus var. affinis are believed to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
